name: Met Office DataPoint (legacy) / Weather DataHub
dataType: Weather observations, forecasts, warnings, site-specific data, map overlays
description: The Met Office Weather DataHub is the successor to the decommissioned DataPoint API, providing subsettable UK weather observations, forecasts and map overlays as the single access point for Met Office public-task data.

name: Natural England Open Data Geoportal
dataType: Priority habitats, SSSIs, national nature reserves, ancient woodland, Living England habitat map, national trails, green infrastructure
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, CSV, KML, File GDB
description: Natural England's ArcGIS Hub providing open access to habitat maps, protected area boundaries, national character areas and environmental stewardship layers for England.

name: MAGIC (Multi-Agency Geographic Information for the Countryside)
operator: Natural England / Defra partnership (Environment Agency, Historic England, Forestry Commission, MMO)
dataType: Designations, habitats, agri-environment schemes, landscape character, historic environment, marine, woodland
formats: Interactive map viewer, WMS/WFS endpoints, downloadable from source agencies
description: Multi-agency interactive map bringing together over 400 environmental and rural designation datasets from six UK government bodies in a single viewer covering England, Wales and Scotland.

name: data.gov.uk (UK National Open Data Portal)
dataType: All UK government open data: transport, environment, health, economy, geospatial, statistics
formats: CSV, JSON, Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, XLS, PDF, RDF
description: The UK Government's central open data catalogue indexing over 47 000 datasets from all departments, with a CKAN-based search API and links to hosted data across government.

name: Environmental Information Data Centre (EIDC / UKCEH)
operator: UK Centre for Ecology & Hydrology (UKCEH) / NERC
dataType: Land cover maps, river flow, soil moisture (COSMOS-UK), evapotranspiration, species surveys, water quality, atmospheric chemistry
formats: NetCDF, GeoTIFF, CSV, Shapefile, ESRI File GDB
license: Open Government Licence / custom NERC licences
description: NERC's CoreTrustSeal-certified national data centre for terrestrial and freshwater science, holding UKCEH land cover maps, river flow archives, COSMOS-UK soil moisture and hundreds of ecology datasets.

name: Historic England Open Data Hub
dataType: Listed buildings, scheduled monuments, registered parks and gardens, World Heritage Sites, conservation areas, archaeological priority areas
description: ArcGIS Hub providing the National Heritage List for England with GIS boundaries for all listed buildings, scheduled monuments, conservation areas and historic parks.

name: Marine Scotland Data / NMPi
dataType: Marine habitats, fish stocks, renewable energy zones, bathymetry, protected areas, aquaculture sites
description: Scottish Government's marine open data network including the National Marine Plan interactive (NMPi) map viewer and a data publication platform with DOI-referenced datasets on Scotland's seas.

name: Forestry Commission Open Data
dataType: National Forest Inventory, woodland cover, tree species maps, felling licences, grant schemes, forest estate boundaries
description: ArcGIS Hub for Forestry Commission geospatial data including the annually updated National Forest Inventory woodland map, tree species classifications from Sentinel-2 imagery and felling licence boundaries.

name: NatureScot Spatial Data Hub
dataType: SSSIs, SACs, SPAs, national nature reserves, habitat map of Scotland (NVC), peatland survey, landscape character
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, CSV, KML, GeoTIFF, PNG
description: NatureScot's open data hub providing Scotland's protected area boundaries, National Vegetation Classification habitat maps, peatland condition data and the Standing Waters Database for 3 000+ lochs.

name: SpatialData.gov.scot (Scottish SDI)
dataType: INSPIRE-compliant metadata catalogue covering all Scottish public sector spatial data: transport, environment, planning, health, boundaries
formats: Metadata catalogue (GeoNetwork); links to source data in various formats
description: Scotland's INSPIRE-compliant spatial data metadata portal built on GeoNetwork, cataloguing all Scottish public sector geospatial datasets and feeding daily into data.gov.uk.

name: Digimap (EDINA)
dataType: Ordnance Survey maps, BGS geology, historic maps, aerial photography, marine charts, agricultural census, LiDAR
temporalResolution: varies (historic maps from 1840s; current OS updated continuously)
cost: free for UK HE/FE subscribers (institutional subscription via JISC)
formats: TIFF, DXF, NTF, Shapefile, GeoPackage, PNG
description: EDINA's multi-collection mapping service for UK universities providing access to Ordnance Survey, British Geological Survey, historic, marine and aerial data through a single portal.

name: Tailte Eireann Open Data Portal
dataType: National map, geodetic control, admin boundaries, property valuation, placenames, aerial orthophotography
description: Ireland's national mapping and property registration agency open data portal providing the National Map, geodetic network, admin boundaries and valuation data under Creative Commons licence.

name: OPW Flood Info / Open Spatial Data Portal
dataType: Flood extent maps, flood risk zones, historical flood events, river/tidal gauge levels, coastal change data
temporalResolution: real-time (380+ gauges); flood maps updated per CFRAM cycle
description: Ireland's national flood information portal from the OPW, providing CFRAM flood extent maps, real-time river and tidal levels from 380+ gauges, and an open spatial data catalogue for flood risk management.

name: Defra Data Services API Portal
dataType: Real-time flood monitoring, bathing water quality, ecology & fish, water quality, rainfall, hydrology linked data
apiProtocol: REST, Linked Data, OGC API-Features, WCS, WMS, WFS
description: Developer-focused API portal for the Defra Data Services Platform offering RESTful and Linked Data endpoints for real-time flood monitoring, water quality, ecology and hydrology datasets.
